summary: Frontend regression of Admin.jsx modular refactor + Navbar/Footer dynamic logo wiring. Verified via Playwright against the public preview URL. All 14 scenarios from the review request pass, including the previously untested critical logo-sync between navbar and footer (set custom URL -> both show same src with object-contain; clear logo -> both fall back to data-testid placeholders simultaneously).
critical_code_review_comments: Footer.jsx and Navbar.jsx both call fetchSiteSettings() independently on mount. Footer remounts on every route change, so the public site fires 2 /api/site-settings requests per navigation (one from Navbar which is persistent, one from Footer). Consider hoisting site settings into a React context / SWR cache and subscribing in both components. Low-impact (small JSON response) but easy win.

TOKEN_KEY 'mir_admin_token' is stored in localStorage (XSS-readable). Not a regression from this refactor, but per the auth playbook, httpOnly cookies are preferred. Carried over from iteration_9 review.
test_credentials: Admin password mir-admin-2026 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Login succeeded; bad password correctly rejected.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ lead via contact form (name='TEST_Auto Tester', email='test_auto@example.com') and 1 transient logo change. Logo restored to the wikipedia transparency PNG at end of run so the public site has a visible custom logo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL: https://mir-consulting-next.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin route /admin (password-only). Site Settings logo input is rendered by MediaUpload (testIdPrefix='logo'): use [data-testid='logo-url-toggle'] -> [data-testid='logo-url-input'] -> [data-testid='logo-url-save'] -> [data-testid='site-settings-save']. Use [data-testid='logo-clear'] to remove. Public-site logo selectors: navbar-logo-img / navbar-logo-placeholder, footer-logo-img / footer-logo-placeholder. fetchSiteSettings runs on mount in both Navbar and Footer; wait ~2.5s after page.goto for hydration. Use wait_until='domcontentloaded' for home page (networkidle hangs). Stripe public payment link / PDF preview not exercised end-to-end (requires Stripe redirect) -- only invoice list rendering was confirmed via tab click.

detailed_results.contact_form_submit: Filled name/email/company/phone/message via data-testid selectors; success indicator found on page after submit
detailed_results.logout: Clears mir_admin_token from localStorage and returns to admin-login-page

rca_of_the_issue:
N/A - no defects. The Admin.jsx modular refactor (1853-line monolith -> /pages/admin/* modules) preserves all behavior, and the new Footer logo wiring matches Navbar's behavior exactly: both fetch /api/site-settings on mount, render with object-contain when logo_url is truthy, and fall back to
with the 'M' wordmark otherwise. onError handlers also reset both back to the placeholder if the URL fails to load.
